postReview.title: Bournemouth 3-2 Tottenham: Semenyo marks final match with stoppage-time stunner
postReview.description: With a move to Manchester City looming, Antoine Semenyo may have ended his chapter at Bournemouth with a late winner against Tottenham.

postReview.title: Bournemouth 3-2 Tottenham: Semenyo se despide con un golazo en el descuento
postReview.description: Con un posible traspaso al Manchester City en el horizonte, Antoine Semenyo pudo haber cerrado su etapa en el Bournemouth con un gol agónico ante el Tottenham.

postReview.title: Bournemouth-Tottenham 3-2: Semenyo saluta con una perla al 95'
postReview.description: Con il trasferimento al Manchester City che si avvicina, Antoine Semenyo potrebbe aver chiuso il suo capitolo al Bournemouth con un gol-vittoria nel finale contro il Tottenham.

postReview.title: Bournemouth 3-2 Tottenham: Semenyo decide no último lance com golaço nos acréscimos
postReview.description: Com uma transferência para o Manchester City no horizonte, Antoine Semenyo pode ter encerrado sua passagem pelo Bournemouth com o gol da vitória no fim contra o Tottenham.

postReview.title: Bournemouth 3-2 Tottenham : Semenyo clôture son dernier match par un bijou dans le temps additionnel
postReview.description: Alors qu’un transfert vers Manchester City se profile, Antoine Semenyo a peut-être refermé son chapitre à Bournemouth avec un but victorieux dans les dernières secondes contre Tottenham.

postReview.title: Bournemouth 3-2 Tottenham: Semenyo krönt letztes Spiel mit Last-Minute-Traumtor
postReview.description: Antoine Semenyo hat sein Bournemouth-Kapitel womöglich mit einem späten Siegtreffer gegen Tottenham beendet – ein Wechsel zu Manchester City steht offenbar bevor.

postReview.title: بورنموث 3-2 توتنهام: سيمينيو يختتم مشواره بهدف قاتل في الوقت بدل الضائع
postReview.description: مع اقتراب انتقاله إلى مانشستر سيتي، ربما أنهى أنطوان سيمينيو فصله مع بورنموث بهدف فوز متأخر أمام توتنهام.

postReview.title: Bournemouth 3-2 Tottenham: Semenyo decide com um golaço nos descontos
postReview.description: Com a transferência para o Manchester City no horizonte, Antoine Semenyo pode ter fechado a sua passagem pelo Bournemouth com um golo decisivo nos descontos frente ao Tottenham.

preReview.title: Preview: Bournemouth take on Spurs in a game both sides are desperate to win
Iraola da por hecha la salida de Semenyo del Bournemouth tras el duelo ante el Tottenham
preReview.description: Antoine Semenyo estaría cerca de fichar por el Manchester City, y Andoni Iraola cree que su próximo partido con el Bournemouth será el último.

preReview.title: Iraola si aspetta l'addio di Semenyo al Bournemouth dopo la sfida al Tottenham
preReview.description: Semenyo vicino al Manchester City: Iraola teme che contro il Tottenham possa essere l'ultima con il Bournemouth

preReview.title: Iraola prevê saída de Semenyo do Bournemouth após duelo com o Tottenham
preReview.description: Antoine Semenyo estaria perto de se transferir para o Manchester City, e Andoni Iraola acredita que seu próximo jogo pelo Bournemouth será o último.

preReview.title: Iraola s'attend au départ de Semenyo de Bournemouth après le match contre Tottenham
preReview.description: Antoine Semenyo serait proche d'un transfert à Manchester City, et Andoni Iraola pense que son prochain match avec Bournemouth sera le dernier.

preReview.title: Iraola rechnet nach Tottenham-Spiel mit Semenyos Bournemouth-Abgang
preReview.description: Antoine Semenyo steht Berichten zufolge kurz vor einem Wechsel zu Manchester City, und Andoni Iraola glaubt, dass sein nächstes Spiel für Bournemouth zugleich sein letztes sein wird.

preReview.title: إيراولا يتوقع رحيل سيمينيو عن بورنموث بعد مواجهة توتنهام
preReview.description: تقارير تشير إلى اقتراب أنطوان سيمينيو من الانتقال إلى مانشستر سيتي، وأندوني إيراولا يعتقد أن مباراته المقبلة مع بورنموث ستكون الأخيرة.

preReview.title: Iraola acredita na saída de Semenyo do Bournemouth após o jogo com o Tottenham
preReview.description: Antoine Semenyo estará perto de se transferir para o Manchester City e Andoni Iraola acredita que o próximo jogo pelo Bournemouth será o último.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.

translations.estimated_transfer_value_description:
Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) is an estimate of what a player could be worth if they were sold today.

It’s calculated using historical transfer data and a range of performance and context factors, including:

• player performance and development
• age and future potential
• how often and at what level they play
• position
• team and league strength
• remaining contract length

ETV focuses on the player themselves, not rumours or which club might buy them.

The value is updated regularly to reflect changes over time.
translations.xG_onboarding_description:
Expected goals is a measurement of the quality of a shot.

A team’s xG number for a match is an indication of how many goals they could have been expected to score, given the chances they created.

translations.defensive_actions_explained: Defensive contributions is the sum of attempted tackles, blocks, clearances, and interceptions.
translations.stats_comparison_explanation:
The Player Traits chart highlights a player's statistical strengths and weaknesses, in comparison to similar players.

Each stat is adjusted on a per 90 basis and includes matches from the past 365 days.

Players are then compared to positional peers from similar leagues, and placed into a percentile ranking. For example, a player with a 90% percentile ranking on Chances Created means that they create more chances than 90% of players in their position in similar leagues.

Full details on comparisons can be read in our FAQ.
translations.per_90_bar_explanation_text:
The bar graph shows how a player compares to other players in their position on each stat for the currently selected competition. A green bar graph indicates they are among the best in their position at that stat, while a red bar indicates they are among the worst.

The length of the bar graph represents the rank of the player for each stat, based on percentile. Players are compared only against their positional peers from the currently selected competition.

translations.xpts_explanation:
Expected Points (xPts) reflect the number of points a team was expected to earn from a match, based on the quality of their chances measured by Expected Goals (xG).

xPts for a match are calculated by simulating possible outcomes using the quality of shots, expressed as xG. The simulation awards points for wins, draws, or losses based on xG.

The xPts are accumulated over the season to form the 'xG-table', also known as the 'Justice table', which provides an alternative view of team performance beyond actual points earned.
translations.xpts_explanation_green_numbers: Green numbers indicate better underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.xpts_explanation_red_numbers: Red numbers indicate worse underlying numbers than a team's actual results.
translations.site_description_league_table_xg: %1$s %2$s ranked by expected points (xPts). See %1$s xG table, or justice table for %2$s and other seasons on FotMob.
translations.xg_table_explanation:
The xG table ranks teams based on their expected goals (xG) stats.

• Green numbers mean a team is doing better than expected.
• Red numbers mean a team is doing worse than expected.
• The small number next to the xG value shows the difference between expected and actual performance.

For more details on how it’s calculated, check the FAQ.
translations.play_offs_explanation:
The play-off matchups are determined by a draw. In each grouping, the two teams on the left are drawn against the two teams on the right to create two play-off matchups. The play-offs are played over two legs, with the winner going to the round of 16.

There is a separate draw for the round of 16 using the same process.
